Numbers + SHAs clean; 4 stale file:line refs and 1 stale dependency version corrected; §6 ladder appended with 2026-05-04 supersession pointer to §11; §7.7 marked archived (trigger never fired); §7.8 marked activation-consumed.

loc_net_negative_rationale: Audit added supersession/archival pointers (3 blockquote paragraphs, ~30 lines) to keep stale sections current rather than deleting them. AGENTS.md §1 'Stale > missing' permits annotation in place when the historical record has audit value. Pure stale-ref fixes (4 line-number/version corrections) are line-for-line.
next_audit_due: Before Pack 6's first implementer spawn (per prompt §6 'When to invoke this audit'). If Pack 6 closes with KEEP/REVERT, re-run option B (rewrite §6 in place with post-Pack-6 hierarchy) is on the table with explicit human authorization.
unexpected_observations: §7.3 still cites `sqlite3_threadsafe()` in the validation guidance even though §11 B.1 paragraphs document that this assertion is impossible by SQLite design (sqlite3.h:249-252). §7.3 already has the correction inline ('NOT by sqlite3_threadsafe()...') so this is internally consistent, but a future packet revising §7.3 could simplify by removing the original phrasing entirely. Not in scope for this audit (§7 is forward-looking design space; no live experiment depends on §7.3 wording).
